ddls:
CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Title, Subtitle) */,
  "point_size" INTEGER /* Font size of the style in points */,
  "capitalization" TEXT /* Capitalization type (e.g., Uppercase, Lowercase) */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Text alignment (e.g., Center, Left Margin) */,
  "spacing_before" TEXT /* Spacing before the element */,
  "spacing_after" TEXT /* Spacing after the element */,
  "emphasis_type" TEXT /* Type of emphasis (e.g., Bold, Italic) */,
  "font_family" TEXT /* Font family of the style */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES style_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default style used in the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of template (e.g., Report, Presentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Editor, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_styles" (
  "user_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-style mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or modified the style */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style that was created or modified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the style was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the style was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_styles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_styles_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style being used */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document in which the style was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the style has been used in the document */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date when the style was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_styles" (
  "doc_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-style mapping */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document using the style */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style used in the document */,
  "style_position" INTEGER /* Position of the style in the document (e.g., 1 for Title, 2 for Subtitle) */,
  "style_usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the style has been used in the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_styles_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_styles_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision record */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style that was revised */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the style */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_revisions_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style for which the guideline applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guideline for using the style */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the style in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_guidelines_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the style or template */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style accessed */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the style or template was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
